task: Build a transparent geospatial levelized-cost model to estimate the delivered cost of African green hydrogen to Europe (via ammonia shipping and reconversion) by 2030 under multiple financing and policy scenarios, identify least-cost/competitive locations, and quantify how de-risking and the interest-rate environment change cost competitiveness relative to producing green hydrogen in Europe.

data.name: hex_final_NA_min.csv
data.description: Simulated dataset for African hydrogen production sites, including latitude, longitude, PV potential, wind potential, and distances to road, grid, ocean, and water infrastructure. Used as input for LCOH calculations.

data.name: ne_10m_admin_0_countries.shp
data.description: Main shapefile containing country boundary geometries for Africa and the world at 1:10m scale. Used as basemap for spatial visualizations.

data.name: ne_10m_admin_0_countries.shx
data.description: Shape index file required for reading the shapefile geometry data efficiently.

data.name: ne_10m_admin_0_countries.dbf
data.description: Attribute database file containing tabular information (country names, codes, etc.) associated with each geometry.

data.name: ne_10m_admin_0_countries.prj
data.description: Projection file that defines the coordinate system and map projection of the shapefile data.

data.name: ne_10m_admin_0_countries.cpg
data.description: Code page file specifying the character encoding used in the .dbf attribute file (typically UTF-8 or Latin-1).
